description_long: This is a low-top athletic shoe with a rounded toe and a classic sneaker silhouette. The upper appears smooth and seamless, with subtle stitching details along the sides and around the lace area. The shoe features a standard lace-up closure with eyelets running up the vamp, and a padded collar for comfort around the ankle. The sole is moderately thick and flat, likely made of rubber, providing cushioning and grip for urban walking. The heel and toe are both rounded, and the overall design is minimalistic with no visible branding or decorative elements. The shoe is entirely white, giving it a clean and versatile appearance suitable for various urban environments.
description: A clean, all-white low-top sneaker with a smooth upper, standard laces, and a flat rubber sole. Minimalistic design with no visible branding or decoration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth upper, standard lacing, and flat sole profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, lace arrangement, and symmetrical shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the first side with visible stitching and sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the padded collar and heel structure.
